title: Erils
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=[[Erils]] |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]]''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]'' |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Lant Mining Corporation]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Erils, those alien fuzzballs at the starport put us off schedule. Must have been the slowest loaders I've ever seen. Any chance of saving time in hyperspace?''"
"''Yes, but it increases the risk factor by .22 for a total of .35…''"
"''Which exceeds LMC policy and is therefore prohibited.|Captain [[Pricene]] and Erils|}} '''Erils''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] who worked for the [[Lant Mining Corporation]]. She was the [[Navigator/Legends|navigator]] of [[LMC Hauler One-Six]], the lead ship of [[Convoy LMC-55c]], when it was captured by an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] and a [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]]. ==Sources== *''[[Flashpoint! Brak Sector]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Lant Mining Corporation employees]] [[Category:Navigators]]
